stemHtml: During an approach procedure, the radar controller instructs you to "STAND BY FOR MUDPARK PRECISION THIS FREQUENCY." What does this mean? You should...

options.a: say nothing and wait for a different controller to call you on the frequency you are on now.
options.b: change frequency to that published for Mudpark Precision and wait for the controller to call you on that frequency.
options.c: change frequency to that published for Mudpark Precision and establish communications on that frequency.
options.d: acknowledge the call and wait for a different controller to call you on the frequency you are on now.
